urdu transliteration text:
Sheh Kehtey Thay Aay Zainab-e-Maghmum Dil Afghar
Hum Jaate Hai Ran Ko
english translation text:
Shah (Imam Hussain) said: O Zainab, the sorrowful, the heartbroken,
It's time I go to the battlefield.

urdu transliteration text:
Lo Aao Sambhaalo Meri Ujdi Hui Sarkar
Come, take care of my orphaned tribe,
Hum Jaate Hai Ran Ko
english translation text: For it's time I go to the battlefield.

urdu transliteration text:
Maghmum Meri Pyari Sakina Ko Bulado, Yeh Unko Sunado
Dhundey Gi Kahan Ran May Hai Abbas Alamdaar
Hum Jaatey Hai Ran Ko
english translation text:
Call my sorrowful Sakina, and tell her
Not to search for her uncle, for Abbas the flagbearer lies in the desert
It's time I go to the battlefield.

urdu transliteration text:
Girtey Hai Kamar Toot Chuki Aaye Akbar, Hum Shakley Payambar
Ghode Pe Bitha Jaaye Aye Ghazi o Jarrar
Hum Jaatey Hai Ran Ko
english translation text:
My back is broken, my steps falter; come Ali Akbar, he who resembles the Prophet
Mount me on my horse, my brave Ghazi
It's time I go to the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ran Ko Musafir Ka Hai Yeh Aakhri Jaana, Phir Hoga Na Aana
Allah Ko Sopa Tumhay e Itrat e Athaar
Hum Jaatey Hai Ran Ko
english translation text:
This is now the the last trip of the traveller into the desert; there will be no return
I have entrusted you to Allah, O the descendants of the Pure
It's time I go to the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Ruksath Thi Wazirah Shah e Jinn o Bashar Ki, Zehra Ke Pissar Ki
Farmatey The Humshir Ko Ro Kar Shah e Abrar
Hum Jaatey Hai Ran Ko
english translation text:
It was the farewell of the King of men and jinn; the son of Zehra
Shah (Imam Hussain) wept for his sister and said:
It's time I go to the battlefield

urdu transliteration text: Sheh Kehtey Thay Aay Zainab-e-Maghmum Dil Afghar
english translation text: Shah said: O Zainab, the sorrowful, the heartbroken
